summary: Iteration 29: Testing Pinnwand Category Containers, Quick Search (Ctrl+K), and OCR with Tesseract. All 7 features tested successfully - 12 backend API tests passed, 7 frontend UI tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Test categories and articles created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: (1) Pinnwand category containers display with title from second word of category name (e.g., 'Pinnwand NEWS' shows as 'NEWS', 'Pinnwand SPECIALS' shows as 'SPECIALS'). (2) Articles in Pinnwand containers are displayed as single-line rows with title, date, and view count. (3) Quick Search opens via Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut and via header button. (4) Quick Search dialog shows 'Schnellnavigation' with links to Dashboard, Artikel, Dokumente, Kategorien, Benutzer, Einstellungen. (5) Quick Search searches articles, documents, and categories. (6) OCR status endpoint returns available=true with Tesseract provider. (7) OCR button 'Text per OCR extrahieren' appears for PDF documents in document viewer. (8) OCR extracts text from PDF with confidence score (tested: 89.3% confidence, 8 words, 23 characters from Verteiler-Gruppen.pdf).

pinnwand_category_containers.details: Each Pinnwand category has its own Card container with title from second word (e.g., 'Pinnwand NEWS' → 'NEWS')

pinnwand_article_rows.details: Articles displayed as PinnwandArticleRow - single-line with title, date, view count

quick_search_ctrl_k.details: Ctrl+K opens CommandDialog with search input and quick navigation

quick_search_finds_articles.details: Search endpoint /api/articles/search returns matching articles by title

ocr_button_for_pdf.details: OCR button 'Text per OCR extrahieren' appears in document viewer for PDF files

ocr_extracts_text.details: OCR extracts text from PDF with confidence score (89.3%), word count (8), character count (23)

screenshots: .screenshots/iter29_ocr_result.png - OCR result dialog with confidence score
